Powered by Check Point Harmony Email & Collaboration
The Email Security Challenge

We'll find the threats your email security missed — or we pay you.

$10,000
14-Day Guarantee
If we can't uncover threats your current provider let through within 14 days, we'll send you $10,000 USD.

How do you really secure Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace?
Cybertronium, an authorized Check Point partner in Malaysia, runs a patented, API-based health check on your live email and exposes the phishing & malwareslipping past your existing defenses. Free of charge, no obligation — keep the full report either way.

Register for the challengeFree · limited slots · zero disruption to mail flow
1

Connect in minutes

API-based — no MX changes, no downtime, no impact on mail flow.

2

14-day health check

We scan inbound, outbound & internal email on your live M365 / Workspace.

3

Get the verdict

A full report of what got through — or your $10,000. Yours to keep, no obligation.

Who qualifies

  • ✓A production Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace environment with 50+ mailboxes.
  • ✓An existing enterprise-grade email security solution in place (e.g. Proofpoint, Mimecast, Cisco).
  • ✓New to Check Point Harmony Email & Collaboration, and not currently using API-based tools such as Abnormal or IRONSCALES.
  • ✓A registered business in continuous operation for at least one year.
  • ✓Able to complete the 14-day Proof of Value, including a short technical walkthrough with the Check Point team.

Signing up does not guarantee participation — our team will confirm your eligibility against Check Point's official challenge rules.

NACSA CSSP-Licensed MSSP24×7 SOC / MDR — MalaysiaAuthorized Check Point PartnerISO 17024-Accredited Training

Take the challenge — register now

Tell us a few details and our team will reach out to schedule your free 14-day assessment.

The $10,000 Email Security Challenge is a promotion by Check Point Software Technologies Ltd., delivered locally by Cybertronium as an authorized Check Point partner. Eligibility: production Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace environments with 50 or more users running a recognized enterprise-grade email security solution; participants must be new to Harmony Email & Collaboration and complete the 14-day Proof of Value process. Signing up does not guarantee participation. Full rules at the official Check Point challenge page. Check Point Software Technologies Ltd. reserves the right to modify or terminate this promotion at any time, at its sole discretion.
